# DevBolt

> 107 free online developer tools. 100% client-side — your data never leaves your browser.

## Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON data instantly
- [Base64 Codec](https://devbolt.dev/tools/base64): Encode and decode Base64 strings with Unicode support
- [Hash Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/hash-generator): Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes
- [UUID Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers in bulk
- [Color Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/color-converter): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats
- [JWT Decoder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens instantly
- [Regex Tester](https://devbolt.dev/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with real-time match highlighting
- [URL Parser](https://devbolt.dev/tools/url-parser): Parse URLs into protocol, host, path, and query params
- [Markdown Preview](https://devbolt.dev/tools/markdown-preview): Write and preview Markdown with live rendering
- [Diff Checker](https://devbolt.dev/tools/diff-checker): Compare two texts and see differences highlighted
- [Epoch Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/epoch-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back
- [Password Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/password-generator): Generate strong, secure random passwords
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text for designs and layouts
- [Case Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/case-converter): Convert text between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and more
- [Number Base Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/number-base-converter): Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hex
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/csv-json): Convert between CSV and JSON formats with custom delimiters
- [Cron Expression Parser](https://devbolt.dev/tools/cron-parser): Parse cron schedules into plain English with next run times
- [Word & Character Counter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, and estimate reading time
- [URL Encoder & Decoder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/url-encoder): Encode and decode URLs with encodeURIComponent and encodeURI
- [JSON to YAML Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-yaml): Convert between JSON and YAML for Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD configs
- [Chmod Calculator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/chmod-calculator): Calculate Unix file permissions with an interactive permission matrix
- [HTML Entity Encoder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/html-entities): Encode and decode HTML entities, special characters, and symbols
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/gradient-generator): Create beautiful CSS gradients visually with live preview
- [QR Code Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/qr-code): Generate customizable QR codes from text or URLs
- [SQL Formatter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/sql-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify SQL queries instantly
- [XML Formatter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/xml-formatter): Format, beautify, validate, and minify XML documents instantly
- [Code Minifier & Beautifier](https://devbolt.dev/tools/code-minifier): Minify and beautify JavaScript, CSS, and HTML code instantly
- [Image to Base64](https://devbolt.dev/tools/image-base64): Convert images to Base64 data URIs or decode Base64 back to images
- [Color Palette Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/color-palette): Generate harmonious color palettes using color theory algorithms
- [JSON to TypeScript](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-typescript): Generate TypeScript interfaces and type aliases from JSON data
- [HTML to Markdown Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/html-markdown): Convert between HTML and Markdown in either direction
- [YAML Formatter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/yaml-formatter): Validate, format, beautify, and minify YAML documents instantly
- [JSON Path Tester](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-path): Test JSONPath expressions against JSON data with real-time evaluation
- [SVG Optimizer](https://devbolt.dev/tools/svg-optimizer): Optimize SVGs by removing metadata, comments, editor data, and unnecessary attributes
- [Image Compressor](https://devbolt.dev/tools/image-compressor): Compress and resize images with adjustable quality — JPEG, WebP, and PNG
- [Box Shadow Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/box-shadow): Design CSS box shadows visually with multiple layers, presets, and live preview
- [Color Contrast Checker](https://devbolt.dev/tools/contrast-checker): Check WCAG 2.1 color contrast ratios for AA and AAA accessibility compliance
- [Flexbox Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/flexbox-generator): Build CSS flexbox layouts visually with live preview, item config, and presets
- [Grid Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/grid-generator): Build CSS grid layouts visually with columns, rows, gap, item placement, and presets
- [Border Radius Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/border-radius): Design CSS border-radius visually with per-corner controls, unit selection, and presets
- [Text Shadow Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/text-shadow): Design CSS text shadows visually with multiple layers, presets, and live preview
- [CSS Animation Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/css-animation): Build CSS keyframe animations visually with presets, live preview, and copy-ready code
- [Markdown Table Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/markdown-table): Build Markdown tables visually with an interactive editor, CSV import, and alignment controls
- [Text to Binary Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/text-binary): Convert text to binary, hexadecimal, octal, or decimal and decode back with UTF-8 support
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/meta-tag-generator): Generate SEO, Open Graph, and Twitter Card meta tags with live Google and social previews
- [JSON Schema Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-schema): Validate JSON data against JSON Schema (Draft 07) with detailed error reporting and schema generation
- [IP / CIDR Toolkit](https://devbolt.dev/tools/subnet-calculator): Subnet calculator, VLSM divider, IP range to CIDR converter, and IP address classifier
- [.gitignore Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/gitignore-generator): Generate .gitignore files from 50+ templates — Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Rust, and more
- [Crontab Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/cron-generator): Build cron expressions visually — select frequency, time, and days to generate cron schedules
- [Favicon Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/favicon-generator): Generate favicons from text or emoji — download PNGs, SVG, Apple Touch Icon, and HTML tags
- [URL Slug Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/slug-generator): Convert text into clean, URL-friendly slugs with Unicode transliteration and bulk mode
- [cURL to Code](https://devbolt.dev/tools/curl-converter): Convert cURL commands to JavaScript, Python, Go, PHP, Ruby, and Java code instantly
- [JSON to CSV Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-csv): Convert JSON arrays to CSV with nested object flattening, column selection, and .csv download
- [Tailwind CSS Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/tailwind-generator): Build Tailwind CSS utility classes visually with live preview and component presets
- [Open Graph Preview](https://devbolt.dev/tools/og-preview): Preview and debug Open Graph, Twitter Card, and SEO meta tags for social sharing
- [JS/TS Playground](https://devbolt.dev/tools/js-playground): Run JavaScript and TypeScript code in your browser with instant console output
- [JSON Diff](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-diff): Compare two JSON objects and see structural differences — added, removed, and changed keys
- [TOML to JSON/YAML Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/toml-converter): Convert between TOML, JSON, and YAML — perfect for Cargo.toml and pyproject.toml
- [Encode / Decode Multi-Tool](https://devbolt.dev/tools/encode-decode): Base64, Base32, Hex, Binary, URL, and HTML encoding & decoding all in one tool
- [Docker Compose Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/docker-compose): Validate and format Docker Compose files — check services, networks, volumes, and dependencies
- [Privacy Policy Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/privacy-policy): Generate a customized privacy policy with GDPR, CCPA, cookies, analytics, and payment sections
- [HTTP Status Codes](https://devbolt.dev/tools/http-status-codes): Complete HTTP status code reference — 1xx through 5xx with detailed explanations and use cases
- [Date Format Tester](https://devbolt.dev/tools/date-format-tester): Test date format patterns for strftime, date-fns, Moment.js, Go, and Java with live preview
- [JSON Mock Data Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-mock-generator): Generate realistic fake JSON data for API testing with 30+ field types and preset templates
- [README Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/readme-generator): Generate professional GitHub README.md files with badges, installation steps, and usage examples
- [Dockerfile Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/dockerfile-validator): Validate and lint Dockerfiles for syntax errors, security issues, best practices, and layer optimization
- [Kubernetes YAML Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/k8s-validator): Validate Kubernetes manifests for syntax, required fields, best practices, security, and resource limits
- [robots.txt Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/robots-generator): Generate robots.txt files with crawl rules for Googlebot, Bingbot, AI bots, and more
- [OpenAPI / Swagger Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/openapi-validator): Validate OpenAPI 3.x and Swagger 2.0 specs for structure, paths, schemas, security, and best practices
- [Zod Schema Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/zod-schema): Generate Zod validation schemas from JSON — auto-detects emails, URLs, UUIDs, dates, and nested objects
- [Placeholder Image Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/placeholder-image): Generate custom placeholder images for wireframes, mockups, and prototyping with custom dimensions and colors
- [Nginx Config Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/nginx-config): Generate nginx configuration files — server blocks, SSL, reverse proxy, gzip, load balancing, and security headers
- [.env File Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/env-validator): Validate .env files for syntax errors, duplicate keys, security risks, and best practices
- [File Hash Calculator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/file-hash): Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 file hashes with drag-and-drop and checksum comparison
- [ASCII Art Text Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/ascii-art): Convert text into ASCII art with 7 font styles and comment wrapping for code
- [Regex Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/regex-generator): Generate regex patterns by describing what you need — 60+ curated patterns, visual composer, and live tester
- [LLM Token Counter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/token-counter): Count tokens and estimate API costs for GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs
- [AI Model Comparison](https://devbolt.dev/tools/ai-model-comparison): Compare GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more — pricing, context windows, capabilities, and reasoning support
- [Git Command Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/git-command-builder): Build git commands visually — branching, merging, rebasing, stashing, tags, and 80+ cheat sheet entries
- [CSP Header Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/csp-builder): Build Content Security Policy headers visually with framework presets, security analysis, and multi-format output
- [HTML to JSX Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/html-to-jsx): Convert HTML to JSX — class to className, inline styles to objects, self-closing tags, and SVG attributes
- [JSON to Code Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-code): Generate typed code from JSON in 8 languages — Go, Python, Java, C#, Dart, Rust, Swift, Kotlin
- [Code Screenshot Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/code-screenshot): Create beautiful code screenshots with 8 themes, syntax highlighting, and customizable backgrounds
- [CSS to Tailwind Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/css-to-tailwind): Convert CSS to Tailwind utility classes instantly — 100+ properties including layout, spacing, typography, and effects
- [JSON Visualizer](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-visualizer): Visualize JSON as an interactive tree — collapsible nodes, search, path copy, and depth controls
- [SVG to JSX Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/svg-to-jsx): Convert SVG to JSX or a React/TypeScript component — camelCase attributes, style objects, forwardRef, and memo
- [AI Prompt Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/prompt-builder): Build structured AI prompts with templates, variables, and multi-format output for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs
- [MCP Config Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/mcp-config-builder): Build MCP configuration files visually for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, and Claude Code
- [OpenAPI to TypeScript](https://devbolt.dev/tools/openapi-to-typescript): Convert OpenAPI 3.x and Swagger 2.0 specs to TypeScript interfaces and types with $ref resolution
- [JSON to Zod Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-zod): Convert JSON or JSON Schema to Zod validation schemas with $ref resolution, allOf/oneOf/anyOf, and enum support
- [JWT Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/jwt-builder): Build and sign JSON Web Tokens with HMAC, RSA, and ECDSA algorithms — visual payload editor with expiration presets
- [tsconfig.json Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/tsconfig-builder): Build TypeScript tsconfig.json visually with framework presets and explanations for every option
- [GraphQL to TypeScript](https://devbolt.dev/tools/graphql-to-typescript): Convert GraphQL SDL schemas to TypeScript interfaces, types, enums, unions, and operations
- [package.json Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/package-json-generator): Generate package.json visually with framework presets, dependency editor, scripts, and module config
- [Security Headers Generator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/security-headers): Generate HTTP security headers for Nginx, Apache, Vercel, Netlify, and Cloudflare with presets and security scoring
- [TypeScript to JavaScript](https://devbolt.dev/tools/typescript-to-js): Convert TypeScript to JavaScript — strip types, interfaces, enums, generics, and access modifiers
- [JSON to SQL Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-sql): Convert JSON arrays to SQL CREATE TABLE and INSERT statements for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite
- [JSON to GraphQL Schema](https://devbolt.dev/tools/json-to-graphql): Generate GraphQL schema definitions from JSON data with automatic type inference and Query/Mutation generation
- [Git Diff Viewer](https://devbolt.dev/tools/git-diff-viewer): Paste unified diff output from git diff and view it with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and side-by-side or inline display
- [SQL to TypeScript/Prisma/Drizzle](https://devbolt.dev/tools/sql-to-typescript): Convert SQL CREATE TABLE statements to TypeScript interfaces, Prisma schema, and Drizzle ORM definitions for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite
- [Compression Tester](https://devbolt.dev/tools/compression-tester): Test and compare Brotli, Gzip, and Deflate compression ratios for text content with side-by-side results
- [TypeScript 6.0 Migration Checker](https://devbolt.dev/tools/ts6-migration): Analyze tsconfig.json for TS 6.0 breaking changes, deprecated options, new defaults, and get a readiness grade with fixes
- [ESLint to Biome Converter](https://devbolt.dev/tools/eslint-to-biome): Convert ESLint config to Biome — maps 100+ rules from core, TypeScript, React, JSX-A11y, and import plugins to biome.json
- [AI Code Security Scanner](https://devbolt.dev/tools/code-security-scanner): Scan JavaScript and TypeScript code for vulnerabilities — hardcoded secrets, injection, XSS, SSRF, prototype pollution, and 20+ security checks
- [Code Complexity Analyzer](https://devbolt.dev/tools/code-complexity-analyzer): Analyze JavaScript and TypeScript code for cyclomatic complexity, cognitive complexity, nesting depth, and maintainability index with per-function metrics
- [HTTP Request Builder](https://devbolt.dev/tools/http-request-builder): Build HTTP requests visually and generate code in cURL, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, and PHP — lightweight Postman/ReqBin alternative
- [GitHub Actions Validator](https://devbolt.dev/tools/github-actions-validator): Validate GitHub Actions workflow YAML for syntax, triggers, jobs, steps, dependencies, deprecated actions, and permissions

## Cheat Sheets

- [Regex Cheat Sheet](https://devbolt.dev/cheatsheets/regex): Interactive regex reference with metacharacters, character classes, quantifiers, anchors, lookaround, flags, and common patterns
- [Git Cheat Sheet](https://devbolt.dev/cheatsheets/git): Interactive Git command reference with 75+ commands across setup, branching, merging, stashing, recovery, tags, and submodules
- [Docker Cheat Sheet](https://devbolt.dev/cheatsheets/docker): Interactive Docker CLI reference covering images, containers, networks, volumes, Compose, Dockerfile instructions, and debugging
